title: Isolation of Nuclei from Frozen Human Peripheral Nerve
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1b123","text":"This protocol details the efficient isolation of intact nuclei from frozen peripheral nerve from human (e.g. sciatic, tibial, etc.)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Nerve samples should be collected as quickly as possible from the donor. Place the nerve in a clean, labeled container. Snap-freeze in liquid nitrogen Store at -80C until usage
Remove the sample from -80C storage and maintain on dry ice. Do not let it thaw.
creator: Alexander Chamessian
